description: Plan Briefing checkpoint: a deterministic, stateless Node command hook on EVERY ExitPlanMode (Quick Fix Mode, /create-spec & /update-spec plan phases, and plain plan mode). It allows when a real user reply immediately precedes the call (the turn-final Plan Briefing flow) and blocks a straight planning -> ExitPlanMode skip with a short reminder. Fail-open on any uncertainty, so it never deadlocks. Filters subagent (isSidechain) and injected (isMeta) entries. Reads the transcript only; writes nothing anywhere.
